children.label: recovery_policy
signature: { type?: string | undefined; query?: { base?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined

functions.label: isStateTransitionAllowed
description: Cross-field validation predicates — shared between the CRUD API and the manage_rule tool.
signature: (data: { kind?: string | undefined; state_transition?: unknown; }) => boolean

functions.label: validateDuration
description: Validate a duration string format (e.g., "5m", "1h", "30s", "250ms")
returnComment: Error message if invalid, undefined if valid

functions.label: validateEsqlQuery
description: Validate an ES|QL query string
returnComment: Error message if invalid, undefined if valid

functions.label: validateMaxDuration
description:
Validate that a duration string does not exceed a maximum duration.
Both values must be valid duration strings.
returnComment: Error message if exceeded, undefined if valid

functions.label: validateMinDuration
description:
Validate that a duration string is not below a minimum duration.
Both values must be valid duration strings.
returnComment: Error message if below minimum, undefined if valid

for the destination discriminator and any filter that targets destination type.

description: Maximum number of fields used to group alerts (rule grouping, action policy groupBy).

description: Maximum length for KQL/filter query strings (e.g. action policy matcher, bulk operation filter).

misc.label: MAX_NAME_LENGTH
description: Maximum length for human-readable name fields (rule name, action policy name).

objects.label: bulkOperationParamsSchema
description:
Schema for bulk operation request bodies.

At least one targeting param must be provided:
- `ids` — explicit list (cannot be combined with filter/search/match_all)
- `filter` / `search` — scoped selection
- `match_all` — explicit opt-in to target every rule

objects.label: bulkOperationResponseSchema
description: Bulk operation response schema.

objects.label: esqlQuerySchema
description: Primitives

description: Evaluation (required)

objects.label: findRulesParamsSchema
description: Query parameters for the find rules (list) API.

objects.label: findRulesResponseSchema
description: Paginated list response schema.

objects.label: groupingSchema
description: Grouping (optional)

objects.label: metadataSchema
description: Metadata (required)

objects.label: ruleAttachmentDataSchema
description:
Data stored inside a rule attachment.

Server-generated fields (id, enabled, createdBy, createdAt, updatedBy, updatedAt)
are optional so that the same schema covers both:
  - proposed rules (by-value, not yet saved — no id or audit fields)
  - saved rules    (by-reference, linked via attachment.origin = rule saved object id)

objects.label: ruleResponseSchema
description:
Schema for rule response data returned from the API.
Extends the base rule schema with server-generated fields.

objects.label: ruleTagsResponseSchema
description: Rule tags response schema.

objects.label: scheduleEverySchema
description:
Schedule (required)
Duration with an additional minimum-interval guard for schedule frequency.

objects.label: tagsSchema
description:
Shared schema for tag arrays used across alerting v2 (rule metadata, action policies,
alert tag actions, tag filters). Each tag is up to 128 characters. Up to 20 tags allowed.

objects.label: updateRuleDataSchema
description: Update rule API schema — all fields optional for partial updates
